title: governance.policy_* event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.15. Produced by epd2_governance_service.events.governance_policy_public_payload, shared verbatim by three distinct event_type builders: build_policy_proposed_event (governance.policy_proposed), build_policy_activated_event (governance.policy_activated), build_policy_superseded_event (governance.policy_superseded) - verified by reading events.py, all three call the shared payload function and differ only in event_type. Deliberately omits proposed_by_role_id and approved_by_role_id entirely (canon 19b.2).
